arts.ttl: Man United's clash with Lyon has added spice after Andre Onana's spat with Nemanja Matic - the French side have their BANNED boss back on the touchline and ex-Premier League players out to prove a point
arts.sum: Manchester United's season hinges on what will unfold on Thursday night and the following one when they face Lyon in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: “Why can’t I score?” – Rasmus Højlund trying to find reasons for Manchester United struggle
arts.sum: If anybody thought Rasmus Højlund was simply surfing through his Manchester United goal struggles and not letting the situation bother him too much, they are quite mistaken. The 22-year-old has scored eight goals this season, and given he’s Manchester United’s only real striker, the pressure has been piled on his shoulders. arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Everton have ‘ACCEPTED’ transfer for Jarrad Branthwaite
arts.sum: Everton have opened the door to Manchester United moving for centre-back Jarrad Branthwaite again this summer. A year ago, Man Utd hounded the Toffees to sell the centre-back, but after no deal was done, the Red Devils instead moved for Matthijs de Ligt.

arts.ttl: Lyon star blames Ruben Amorim for Alejandro Garnacho's Man Utd struggles
arts.sum: Lyon full-back Nicolas Tagliafico put Alejandro Garnacho's miserable form for Manchester United down to the arrival of head coach Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: I rejected Man Utd for Celtic and broke a gentleman's agreement - Sir Alex Ferguson blew a gasket
arts.sum: The man who stopped Rangers from winning a Treble was also on Liverpool's wanted list

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Fiorentina 'respond' as Red Devils are linked with a swoop for former star David de Gea
arts.sum: Fiorentina allegedly plan to trigger a one-year extension in the contract of David de Gea amid suggestions that Manchester United could attempt to re-sign him.

Ruben Amorim’s side remain unbeaten in Europe this season, despite a difficult domestic campaign. arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim fires Kobbie Mainoo warning ahead of Man Utd return
